deficit_summary: 47 connections broken across 4 frequency bands. Strongest deficits in alpha interhemispheric coherence and beta motor network.
tract_summary: 23 white matter tracts destroyed. 18 channels placed after collision filtering. Primary channels reconnect precentral ↔ postcentral and superior frontal ↔ parietal.
scaffold_details: Cavity volume 4.2 cm³. 18 channels, diameter range 120–280 µm. Scaffold fill 27%. Max curvature radius 340 µm.

deficit_summary: 62 connections broken, 5 frequency bands. Major loss in gamma small-world index and theta fronto-temporal coherence.
tract_summary: 29 tracts destroyed including portions of the arcuate fasciculus. 24 channels placed, prioritizing temporal ↔ inferior parietal reconnection.
scaffold_details: Cavity volume 6.8 cm³. 24 channels, diameter range 110–300 µm. Scaffold fill 29%. Max curvature radius 410 µm.

scaffold_details: Cavity volume 3.1 cm³. 13 channels, diameter range 130–270 µm. Scaffold fill 25%. Max curvature radius 290 µm.

scaffold_details: Cavity volume 2.7 cm³. 11 channels, diameter range 140–260 µm. Scaffold fill 24%. Max curvature radius 260 µm.

deficit_summary: 39 connections broken. Cingulate-frontal theta connectivity reduced by 55%. Callosal alpha also impacted.

scaffold_details: Cavity volume 3.9 cm³. 15 channels, diameter range 130–300 µm. Scaffold fill 26%. Max curvature radius 310 µm.

deficit_summary: 71 connections broken, 5 bands. Broad loss in beta motor and gamma working-memory networks.

deficit_summary: 34 connections broken. Primary deficit in left temporal theta → language network impact.

scaffold_details: Cavity volume 3.4 cm³. 14 channels, diameter range 130–280 µm. Scaffold fill 25%. Max curvature radius 300 µm.

deficit_summary: 22 connections broken. Cortico-basal loop disruption; motor beta rhythms most affected.
